message:
fix(raptorq/gf256): add explicit usize type annotations in SIMD equivalence tests

Fix type inference ambiguity in simd_vs_scalar_mul_equivalence and
simd_vs_scalar_addmul_equivalence tests by adding explicit usize type
annotations to iterator closures and array literals. Ensures the
wrapping_mul calls resolve unambiguously on all targets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
